title: pavonia integrifolia
intro: Pavonia integrifolia, also known as Pavonia guanacastensis, is a plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae) and is native to Central America and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pavonia integrifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pavonia integrifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, including colds, flu, and respiratory issues.
